defaults.hook_text: ROY KEANE ENDED HIS DAD'S CAREER
defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Erling Haaland's face celebrating intensely, his face filling the frame, mouth open screaming, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Roy Keane deliberately ended Alfie Haaland's career with a vicious tackle - Erling Haaland's father never played professional football again and young Erling watched it happen as a child
videos.video_script: When Erling Haaland was just a boy, Roy Keane ended his father's career on purpose. Alfie never played professional football again. Erling remembered every single second. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Erling Haaland celebration close up, Erling Haaland Manchester City goal, Erling Haaland screaming face, Erling Haaland hat trick celebration, Erling Haaland determined intense face, Erling Haaland Norway goal celebration, Erling Haaland arms wide screaming, Erling Haaland Champions League celebration, Erling Haaland best moment close up, Erling Haaland emotional winning
